member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider
member.summary: Provides words for the typing system.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.HasMoreWords
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there are more words available.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.WordCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of words available.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.GetNextWord
member.summary: Gets the next word from the provider.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.AddWord(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Char})
member.summary: Adds a word to the provider.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.AddWords(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Char}})
member.summary: Adds multiple words to the provider.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.AddWordsFromFile(System.String)
member.summary: Adds words from a file to the provider.
member.param: The path to the file containing words.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.ClearWords
member.summary: Clears all words from the provider.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Abstractions.IWordProvider.RemoveWord(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Char})
member.summary: Removes a specific word from the provider.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.ArrayWordProvider
member.summary: A word provider that uses an internal array (via ) to store words.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.ArrayWordProvider.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified words.
member.param: The collection of words to initialize the provider with.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics
member.summary: Calculates and tracks typing performance metrics.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.Accuracy
member.summary: Gets the typing accuracy as a value between 0 and 1.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.CharactersPerMinute
member.summary: Gets the number of correct characters typed per minute.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.Elapsed
member.summary: Gets the total time elapsed since the metrics tracking started.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.TotalEvaluated
member.summary: Gets the total number of non-faulted inputs evaluated.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.CorrectInputs
member.summary: Gets the number of correct inputs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.FaultedInputs
member.summary: Gets the number of faulted inputs (e.g., out of range).

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.MistakeInputs
member.summary: Gets the number of mistake inputs (mismatches).

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.TotalInputs
member.summary: Gets the total number of inputs recorded.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.Record(Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult)
member.summary: Records a validation result and updates the metrics.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingMetrics.Reset
member.summary: Resets all tracked metrics and restarts the timer.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a typing validation.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.Undefined
member.summary: The status is undefined.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.Match
member.summary: The input character matches the expected character.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.Completed
member.summary: The input character matches the last character of the target sequence.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.Mismatch
member.summary: The input character does not match the expected character.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.EmptyTarget
member.summary: The target sequence is empty.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus.PositionOutOfRange
member.summary: The validation position is out of range for the target sequence.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a typing validation operation.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.#ctor(Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidationStatus,System.Char,System.Byte,System.Char,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Represents the result of a typing validation operation.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.IsComplete
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the typing operation is complete.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.IsCorrect
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the input was correct.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.IsFaulted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the validation failed due to an error (e.g., out of range).

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.Expected
member.summary: Gets the expected character at the validation position.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.Input
member.summary: Gets the input character that was validated.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.NextPosition
member.summary: Gets the next position to validate in the target sequence.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.Position
member.summary: Gets the position in the target sequence where the validation occurred.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.TargetLength
member.summary: Gets the total length of the target sequence.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingResult.Status
member.summary: Gets the status of the validation.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState
member.summary: Represents the current state of a typing operation for a single word.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.CorrectCount
member.summary: The number of correctly typed characters.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.Position
member.summary: The current position in the target sequence.

member.name: F:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.MistakeCount
member.summary: The number of mistakes made during typing.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.Initial
member.summary: Gets the initial typing state.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.IsComplete(System.Byte)
member.summary: Checks if the typing operation is complete for the given target length.
member.param: The length of the target sequence.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.WithCorrect
member.summary: Creates a new state reflecting a correct input.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingState.WithMistake
member.summary: Creates a new state reflecting a mistake input.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions
member.summary: Provides options for configuring the typing validation process.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.OnCompleted
member.summary: Action to execute when a word is successfully completed.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.OnFault
member.summary: Action to execute when a validation fault occurs (e.g., out of range).

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.OnMatch
member.summary: Action to execute when an input character matches.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.OnMismatch
member.summary: Action to execute when an input character does not match.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.OnValidated
member.summary: Action to execute after any validation has occurred.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.IgnoreCase
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to ignore case during validation.

member.name: P:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions.Metrics
member.summary: Gets or sets the metrics collector to use during validation.

member.name: T:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Utilities.TypingValidator
member.summary: Provides core logic for validating typing input against target sequences.

member.name: M:Bezoro.TypingSystem.Utilities.TypingValidator.ValidateInput(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Byte,System.Char,Bezoro.TypingSystem.Types.TypingValidatorOptions)
member.summary: Validates the input character against the target sequence at the given position. Expected to be used to validate words one by one.
member.param: The target sequence to validate against.
The position in the target sequence to validate against.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Enables C# 9 init-only setters on older frameworks.
